channel.title: Colors of Provence — A Traveler's Companion
channel.description: Short spoken-word essays on the history, politics, culture, and food of Paris, Provence, and the Rhône — a personal companion for the journey from Arles to Lyon.
channel.itunes:author: France Podcast
channel.itunes:summary: Short spoken-word essays on the history, politics, culture, and food of Paris, Provence, and the Rhône — a personal companion for the journey from Arles to Lyon.

image.title: Colors of Provence — A Traveler's Companion

item.title: The Tongues of the South
item.itunes:title: The Tongues of the South
item.description:
Somewhere on this journey you are going to notice that the map is lying to you a little. It will tell you that you are in France, and you are, but the words painted on the signs at the edge of the villages will sometimes come in pairs.
Full transcript: https://ardell.github.io/france_podcast/episodes/0675-tongues-of-the-south.html
item.itunes:summary:
Somewhere on this journey you are going to notice that the map is lying to you a little. It will tell you that you are in France, and you are, but the words painted on the signs at the edge of the villages will sometimes come in pairs.
Full transcript: https://ardell.github.io/france_podcast/episodes/0675-tongues-of-the-south.html
